description: Evidence emitted by the security-gather agent. Contains the raw outputs of the Cedar (agent tool-call audit) and Guardians (plan data-flow) deterministic security engines, plus a deterministic verdict derived from those outputs. No LLM judgment: verdict and examined are fully determined by the engine_report.

scope.description: Scope flags for this gather step. Security has no scope flags — may be {}.

cedar.description: Raw output of the Cedar engine (agent tool-call audit). Keys: status, flags. May be a fallback stub when Cedar could not run.

guardians.description: Raw output of the Guardians engine (plan data-flow verification). Keys: ok, violations, warnings. May be a fallback stub when Guardians could not run.

engine_report.description: Fused report from emit-engine-report.js combining Cedar + Guardians outputs. The `violations` array drives the deterministic verdict. May be a fallback stub when both engines failed.

violations.description: Security violations found by Cedar and/or Guardians. Each entry may carry `locked:true` to indicate a blocking violation.

verdict.description: Deterministic verdict. LOCKED_VIOLATION iff engine_report.violations contains any entry with locked:true. n/a if neither engine could run (fail-open — never silent PASS). PASS otherwise.

examined.description: Policy ids, file paths, or other identifiers examined. Non-empty trace confirming the agent ran the engines.
